messages_original: URGENT: Unit 292-16 at 6337 Primrose Ave has a rat infestation in the complex.
Should we send Guox Maintenance & Remodel?
messages_final:
Unit 16 at 6337 Primrose Ave is also reporting a rat infestation in the complex. 

"As someone who is currently undergoing cancer treatment and who is severely immunocompromised, I need to know ASAP what efforts are being made to resolve this issue. With hantavirus in the news, I can’t risk being exposed. Some trees were cut, but there is still access for rats to climb from limbs to the roof and balconies."
Should we send Primex since this tenant seems more sensitive?
